entities.description: teenage boy wearing a blue raincoat

panels.summary: The boy walks alone down a dark, rain-slicked street, holding his raincoat collar.
The boy stops abruptly under a flickering streetlamp, noticing a shadowy figure on a nearby wall.
Close-up of the gray cat sitting on the brick wall, mouth open mid-speech with dramatic manga speed lines.
The boy stares in wide-eyed shock, rain dripping from his hood as he listens to the cat.
